statement: RadarNet improves exact match over BM25 under unseen-domain evaluation.
falsifiable_condition: A matched evaluation fails to show an exact-match improvement over BM25.
source_quote: On DomainQA, RadarNet improves exact match from 61.2% to 68.7% over BM25 under unseen-domain evaluation.

statement: RadarNet is robust to 20% retrieval noise.
falsifiable_condition: Exact match degrades materially under 20% evidence noise.
source_quote: RadarNet maintains 66.4% exact match when 20% of evidence passages contain retrieval noise.

statement: Hierarchical routing reduces retrieval latency versus a flat dense index.
falsifiable_condition: The hierarchical router does not reduce matched median latency.
source_quote: The hierarchical evidence router reduces median retrieval latency by 31% compared with a flat dense index.

statement: Calibrated abstention lowers unsupported answers on ShiftBench.
falsifiable_condition: Matched abstention evaluation does not lower unsupported-answer rate.
source_quote: Our calibrated abstention rule lowers unsupported-answer rate from 14.8% to 6.1% on ShiftBench.

statement: Source-diverse batches improve low-resource domain performance.
falsifiable_condition: Macro-F1 does not improve across matched low-resource domains.
source_quote: Training with source-diverse batches improves Macro-F1 by 4.2 points across three low-resource domains.

statement: Claim-aware reranking contributes substantially to exact match.
falsifiable_condition: Removing reranking does not reduce exact match.
source_quote: Ablation results show that removing claim-aware reranking decreases exact match by 5.6 points.

statement: RadarNet outperforms ColBERT-v2 on the DomainQA temporal split.
falsifiable_condition: A matched evaluation does not outperform ColBERT-v2.
source_quote: RadarNet outperforms ColBERT-v2 by 3.9 exact-match points on the temporal split of DomainQA.

statement: The uncertainty head is well calibrated on the institutional split.
falsifiable_condition: Expected calibration error is not low on the held-out institutional split.
source_quote: The uncertainty head reaches an expected calibration error of 0.041 on the held-out institutional split.

statement: The evaluation relies on CleanEval relevance judgments.
falsifiable_condition: The released relevance judgments are invalid or compromised.
source_quote: Our evaluation protocol follows the CleanEval benchmark and uses its released relevance judgments.

statement: The full system reaches 120 queries per second on one A100.
falsifiable_condition: Matched hardware and batching do not reproduce the reported throughput.
source_quote: The full system processes 120 queries per second on a single A100 GPU with batch size 32.
